# Locked backend dependencies — full transitive tree pinned to exact versions.
# Cross-platform (versions only); pip selects the right wheel per OS/Python.
# Resolved from the pinned direct deps in pyproject.toml (incl. the prod-only
# fastapi-azure-auth / python-jose auth stack, which the dev venv omits).
#
# Regenerate: pip install --dry-run --ignore-installed --report r.json <pyproject deps>
# For hash-verified installs, generate per-target with: uv pip compile --generate-hashes
# Do not edit by hand.

MarkupSafe==3.0.3
PyJWT==2.13.0
PyYAML==6.0.3
SQLAlchemy==2.0.50
aioodbc==0.5.0

annotated-doc==0.0.4
annotated-types==0.7.0
anyio==4.13.0
asyncpg==0.31.0

cffi==2.0.0
click==8.4.1
cryptography==48.0.0
ecdsa==0.19.2
et_xmlfile==2.0.0
fastapi==0.136.3

greenlet==3.5.1
h11==0.16.0
httpcore==1.0.9
